metadata.notes: Vanilla FNV base game only, no DLC. Data sourced from Fallout Wiki.

perks.name: Black Widow
perks.description: +10% damage to male enemies, unique dialogue options with men.

perks.name: Cherchez La Femme
perks.description: +10% damage to female enemies, unique dialogue options with women.

perks.name: Confirmed Bachelor
perks.description: +10% damage to male enemies, unique dialogue options with men.

perks.name: Lady Killer
perks.description: +10% damage to female enemies, unique dialogue options with women.

perks.name: Friend of the Night
perks.description: Enhanced low-light vision, making it easier to see in the dark.

perks.name: Heave Ho!
perks.description: +50% throwing velocity for thrown weapons.

perks.name: Hunter
perks.description: +75% critical damage against animals.

perks.name: Intense Training
perks.description: +1 to any SPECIAL attribute of your choice.

perks.name: Rapid Reload
perks.description: 25% faster reload speed for all weapons.

perks.name: Retention
perks.description: Skill magazines last 3x longer (3 minutes instead of 1).

perks.name: Swift Learner
perks.description: +10% bonus to all experience points earned per rank.

perks.name: Cannibal
perks.description: Ability to eat human corpses to regain health.

effects.description: Can eat human corpses for HP

perks.name: Comprehension
perks.description: Skill books give +4 instead of +3; skill magazines give +20 instead of +10.

perks.name: Educated
perks.description: +2 skill points per level.

perks.name: Entomologist
perks.description: +50% damage against all insects.

perks.name: Rad Child
perks.description: Regenerate health based on radiation level.

effects.description: HP regeneration scaling with radiation level

perks.name: Run 'n Gun
perks.description: Halved accuracy penalty while moving with one-handed ranged weapons.

effects.description: Halved spread penalty for one-handed guns while moving

perks.notes: Prerequisites are OR: need Guns 45 OR Energy Weapons 45 (not both)

perks.name: Travel Light
perks.description: +10% movement speed while wearing light armor or no armor.

perks.name: Bloody Mess
perks.description: +5% overall damage, enemies may explode violently on death.

perks.name: Demolition Expert
perks.description: +20% damage with explosives per rank.

perks.name: Ferocious Loyalty
perks.description: Companions gain +50 DR when player's health drops below 50%.

effects.description: Companions gain +50 DR when player HP < 50%

perks.name: Fortune Finder
perks.description: Find considerably more bottle caps in containers.

perks.name: Gunslinger
perks.description: +25% accuracy in VATS with one-handed weapons.

perks.name: Hand Loader
perks.description: Unlocks special hand-loaded ammunition recipes at reloading benches.

perks.name: Lead Belly
perks.description: -50% radiation from food and water.
perks.notes: Prerequisites are OR: need EN 5 OR Survival 40 (not both)

perks.name: Shotgun Surgeon
perks.description: Shotguns ignore 10 points of enemy DT.

perks.name: The Professional
perks.description: +20% sneak attack critical damage with revolvers, pistols, and SMGs.

effects.description: +20% sneak attack crit damage with pistols/revolvers/SMGs

perks.name: Toughness
perks.description: +3 DT permanently per rank.

perks.name: Vigilant Recycler
perks.description: 2x chance to recover drained energy cells/packs, plus efficient recycling recipes.

effects.description: 2x ammo recovery chance and efficient energy ammo recycling

perks.name: Commando
perks.description: +25% accuracy in VATS with two-handed weapons.

perks.name: Cowboy
perks.description: +25% damage with lever-action firearms, revolvers, dynamite, knives, hatchets.

perks.name: Living Anatomy
perks.description: See enemy HP and DT; +5% damage against humans and non-feral ghouls.

effects.description: +5% damage vs humans and non-feral ghouls

perks.name: Pack Rat
perks.description: Items weighing 2 lbs or less weigh half as much.

perks.name: Quick Draw
perks.description: 50% faster weapon equipping and holstering.

perks.name: Rad Resistance
perks.description: +25% radiation resistance.

perks.name: Scrounger
perks.description: Find considerably more ammunition in containers.

perks.name: Stonewall
perks.description: +5 DT against melee/unarmed attacks, cannot be knocked down.

effects.description: Cannot be knocked down in melee

perks.name: Strong Back
perks.description: +50 lbs carry weight.

perks.name: Super Slam!
perks.description: Melee and unarmed attacks have a chance to knock targets down.

perks.name: Terrifying Presence
perks.description: Unique dialogue option that can terrify enemies, causing them to flee for 5 seconds.

effects.description: Dialogue option to make enemies flee for 5s

perks.name: Animal Friend
perks.description: Rank 1: Animals won't attack. Rank 2: Animals come to your aid in combat.

perks.name: Finesse
perks.description: +5% critical hit chance.

perks.name: Here and Now
perks.description: Immediately gain one level.

perks.name: Math Wrath
perks.description: -10% AP cost for all VATS attacks.

perks.name: Miss Fortune
perks.description: Miss Fortune occasionally appears in VATS to incapacitate enemies.

effects.description: Miss Fortune may appear in VATS

perks.name: Mister Sandman
perks.description: Silently kill sleeping NPCs and gain bonus XP.

effects.description: Can silently kill sleeping NPCs for bonus XP

perks.name: Mysterious Stranger
perks.description: The Mysterious Stranger occasionally appears in VATS to finish off enemies.

effects.description: Mysterious Stranger may appear in VATS

perks.name: Nerd Rage!
perks.description: +15 DT and Strength set to 10 when health drops below 20%.

perks.name: Night Person
perks.description: +2 Intelligence and +2 Perception between 6:00 PM and 6:00 AM.

perks.name: Plasma Spaz
perks.description: -20% AP cost for plasma weapons in VATS.

perks.name: Fast Metabolism
perks.description: +20% hit points restored by Stimpaks.

perks.name: Ghastly Scavenger
perks.description: Eat super mutant and feral ghoul corpses for health.

effects.description: Eat super mutant/ghoul corpses for HP

perks.name: Hit the Deck
perks.description: +25 DT against explosives.

perks.name: Life Giver
perks.description: +30 hit points.

perks.name: Long Haul
perks.description: Can fast travel while over-encumbered.

perks.name: Piercing Strike
perks.description: Melee and unarmed attacks ignore 15 DT.

perks.name: Pyromaniac
perks.description: +50% damage with fire-based weapons.

perks.name: Robotics Expert
perks.description: +25% damage to robots, ability to shut down robots by sneaking up on them.

perks.name: Silent Running
perks.description: Running no longer factors into stealth detection; sneak speed increased.

perks.name: Sniper
perks.description: +25% chance to hit the head in VATS.

perks.name: Splash Damage
perks.description: +25% area of effect for explosives.

perks.name: Unstoppable Force
perks.description: x4 damage through blocks with melee/unarmed attacks.

perks.name: Adamantium Skeleton
perks.description: Limbs take 50% less damage.

perks.name: Center of Mass
perks.description: +15% damage to torso in VATS with firearms.

perks.name: Chemist
perks.description: Chem durations doubled.

perks.name: Jury Rigging
perks.description: Repair any item using a similar item of the same type.

perks.name: Light Step
perks.description: Never set off floor-based traps or mines.

effects.description: Immune to floor traps and mines

perks.name: Purifier
perks.description: +50% damage with melee and unarmed against Abominations.

perks.name: Action Boy/Action Girl
perks.description: +15 Action Points per rank.

perks.name: Better Criticals
perks.description: +50% critical hit damage.

perks.name: Chem Resistant
perks.description: 50% less likely to become addicted to chems.

perks.name: Meltdown
perks.description: Enemies killed by energy weapons emit a damaging energy field on death.

effects.description: Energy weapon kills cause AoE damage

perks.name: Tag!
perks.description: Select a fourth tag skill, gaining +15 points in that skill.

perks.name: Weapon Handling
perks.description: Weapon Strength requirements are reduced by 2.
perks.notes: Cannot be taken if Strength is already 10

perks.name: Computer Whiz
perks.description: Can retry a hacking attempt on a locked-out terminal.

perks.name: Concentrated Fire
perks.description: +5% accuracy bonus per subsequent VATS attack on the same body part.

effects.description: +5% accuracy per consecutive VATS hit on same part

perks.name: Infiltrator
perks.description: Can retry a lockpicking attempt on a broken lock.

perks.name: Paralyzing Palm
perks.description: 30% chance to paralyze enemy for 30 seconds with unarmed VATS attack.

perks.name: Explorer
perks.description: All locations are revealed on the map.

perks.name: Grim Reaper's Sprint
perks.description: Killing an enemy in VATS restores 20 AP.

perks.name: Ninja
perks.description: +15% critical chance with melee/unarmed; +25% damage with sneak attack criticals.

perks.name: Solar Powered
perks.description: +2 Strength and +1 HP/sec regeneration while outdoors during daytime (6 AM-6 PM).

perks.name: Laser Commander
perks.description: +15% damage and +10% critical chance with laser weapons.

perks.name: Nuka Chemist
perks.description: Unlocks special Nuka-Cola recipes at workbenches.

perks.name: Spray and Pray
perks.description: Your attacks deal 75% less damage to companions.

perks.name: Slayer
perks.description: +30% attack speed with melee and unarmed weapons.

perks.name: Nerves of Steel
perks.description: AP regeneration rate significantly increased (+20%).

perks.name: Rad Absorption
perks.description: Radiation level slowly decreases over time (-1 rad/20 sec).

perks.name: Mad Bomber
perks.description: Craft special explosives at workbenches from common items.

traits.name: Built to Destroy
traits.description: +3% critical chance, but weapons degrade 15% faster.

traits.name: Fast Shot
traits.description: Weapons fire 20% faster and cost 20% less AP in VATS, but have 20% less accuracy.

traits.name: Four Eyes
traits.description: +2 Perception while wearing glasses, -1 base Perception permanently.

traits.name: Good Natured
traits.description: +5 to Barter, Medicine, Repair, Science, Speech. -5 to Energy Weapons, Explosives, Guns, Melee Weapons, Unarmed.

traits.name: Heavy Handed
traits.description: +20% melee/unarmed damage, but -60% critical hit damage with melee/unarmed.

effects.description: -60% melee and unarmed critical hit damage

traits.name: Loose Cannon
traits.description: +30% thrown weapons speed and -30% thrown AP cost, but -25% thrown weapon range.

traits.name: Small Frame
traits.description: +1 Agility, but limbs take 25% more damage.

traits.name: Trigger Discipline
traits.description: +20% accuracy, but -20% fire rate and +20% AP cost in VATS.

traits.name: Wild Wasteland
traits.description: Adds wacky and unusual random encounters, items, and Easter eggs throughout the wasteland.

effects.description: Adds unique encounters and replaces some items with alternatives

skill_books.name: Tales of a Junktown Jerky Vendor
Chinese Army: Special Ops Training Manual
